meaning: n.急性硬直,肌肉抽筋vt.引起痉挛
examples: Watson, together with Francis Crick, discovered the structure of DNA, the genetic information carrier of all living organisms.
He said he and Crick had succeeded because they were aware that they weren't the most intelligent of the scientists pursuing the answer.
You might just lie back and let the scent of lavender and the sound of falling water quiet your anxiety while a licensed massage therapist eases the crick in your neck.
Crick's and Watson's groundbreaking work was published in the journal Nature on 25 April 1953.
Here Isaac Newton theorised, Darwin pondered, Crick and Watson discovered DNA and Stephen Hawking hypothesised.
